name: forgeflow-mini
description: Brain-driven development plugin — persistent, evolving knowledge system with 11 multi-agent skills

skills.name: brain-init
skills.description: Initialize Brain for any project (scan → generate → review → persist)

skills.name: brain-task
skills.description: Full task flow: ContextMapper → Planner → Implementer → Documenter

skills.name: brain-map
skills.description: ContextMapper: task → weighted sinapse list → context packet (pipeline-internal, called by brain-task Step 1)

skills.name: brain-plan
skills.description: Planner: context packet + task → structured plan

skills.name: brain-mckinsey
skills.description: Strategic intelligence: internal analysis + external research → recommendation

skills.name: brain-document
skills.description: Documenter: propose sinapse updates after task completion (pipeline-internal, called by TaskCompleted hook)

skills.name: brain-consolidate
skills.description: Consolidation cycle: review → propose → approve → apply

skills.name: brain-codex-review
skills.description: Codex code review agent — validates implementation, finds bugs, checks conventions

skills.name: brain-decision
skills.description: Intelligent task router — classifies complexity, selects model (Codex-first), triggers plan mode, dispatches to brain-task
